name: Jacquie's Excellent Cornbread Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 box Jiffy cornbread muffin mix (this works best for this recipe)
2 jalapenos, minced or 4 serranos if you want it hotter
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the batter according to instructions on the box.
2. In a pan, sauté onions and garlic with 1/2 tablespoon butter or olive oil until onions are translucent.
3. Mix in the minced chiles, shredded Monterey jack cheese, and shredded cheddar cheese into the batter.
4. Pour the batter into muffin molds.
5. Bake according to instructions on the box (approximately 350°F for 10-12 minutes).
6. Enjoy with any meal – a favorite breakfast food. For non-C-H diners, omit the chiles.
